# Offset-carrier regression: same rect-with-hole geometry as
# rect-rect-hole.txt, but with the offset_carriers path on. Every
# aisle-facing boundary edge should get a spine emitted directly
# from its own offset — no weighted skeleton wavefront, no
# asymmetric truncation between sides.

polygon outer
(0,0)
(800,0)
(800,800)
(0,800)
----
polygon outer 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (0,0)-(800,800), area 640000

polygon hole
(300,300)
(500,300)
(500,500)
(300,500)
----
polygon hole 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (300,300)-(500,500), area 40000

generate
----
total_stalls: 1007
faces: 58 (boundary: 2, interior: 56)
graph: 99 vertices, 167 edges (perimeter: 48, interior: 119)
regions: 1
